Unit: gr, Batch x1: 170, Batch x2: 340, Batch x3: 510, Batch x4: 680, Prep/Brand: Dole
Remove the top and bottom and skin of the pineapple
Remove flesh from the core (tough center) of the pineapple
Cut into flat sheets approximately the width of a half sheet of nori
On a pre-heated grill, sear the pineapple on both sides until lightly charred / marked
Reserve in pineapple juice in quart containers in a cooler.
